goals: Store collaboration preferences and project context with the graphic designer
Search for specific design preferences or communication patterns when working on a new interface
Review all stored memories to verify important details are captured
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memories from previous projects

user_agent_config.personality: Technical and precise. Prefers structured information and clear documentation of preferences for efficient collaboration.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in document management systems and interface implementation. Familiar with working with designers but may not know internal memory tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored relevant collaboration preferences, retrieved them when needed, reviewed what memories exist, and removed outdated information.
